entryA.symptom: KQL interactive query on Microsoft Sentinel data lake times out or returns data size exceeded error
entryA.solution: For queries exceeding 30,000 rows or hitting timeout/size limits, submit a KQL job instead of running interactive queries. KQL jobs run asynchronously and promote results into a custom table in the An

entryB.symptom: Sentinel data lake KQL query returns 401-Unauthorized error
entryB.solution: Reauthenticate to refresh the token and verify that the user has the correct RBAC roles for the Sentinel data lake database

conflicts.reasoning: Solutions differ but may apply to different scenarios
